svg.title: Implement and Test: implement or fix kicks off the agentic loop across assistant, LLM and Spec Kit, with checker and architecture review, a rework loop-back on review comments, then merge PR and close ticket
svg.desc: The assistant pulls the next ticket from Jira, applies maker guardrail skills and test rules, then runs /implement or /fix to start an agentic loop spanning the code assistant, LLM and Spec Kit that generates code and tests and runs tests fixing failures. Checker skills review code and coverage and an architecture review agent assesses against corporate guardrails. The assistant reports ready for review; review comments loop back to /implement or /fix, and on approval the PR is merged and the Jira ticket is closed.
svg.text: ↻ agentic loop — generate, run tests, fix, repeat
No separate test phase — tests run in the agentic loop, checker skills verify coverage, and the architecture review agent assesses against guardrails before you see it.
